description: Unique identifier for each construction project (format PRJXXXX)
City where the project is located (India)
State where the project is located (India)
Total built-up area of the project in square feet
Number of floors/storeys in the building
Estimated project completion duration in months (contains ~2% missing values by design)
Total cost of civil works for the project in INR (sum of related line items)
Total cost of electrical works for the project in INR (sum of related line items)
Total cost of plumbing works for the project in INR (sum of related line items)
Total overall project cost in INR (sum of civil + electrical + plumbing)
Total project cost divided by built-up area (INR per sqft)
